creator: dennis.r.friedrichsen@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #8)
My bootloader was from Sep 3, 2020 13:11:43

I update to the latest version (the 2023/01/11) and now 14.0-ALPHA1 boots successfully!

Thanks everyone for the comments.  I will leave this open as suggested so the panic can be addressed.
